mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assets (user_id, name, initial_amount, asset_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{initialAmount}, #{assetType})
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.initial_amount, a.asset_type, a.created_at, CAST( a.initial_amount + COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN t.type = 'INCOME' THEN t.amount WHEN t.type = 'EXPENSE' THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS BIGINT) AS current_balance FROM assets a LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.asset_id = a.id AND t.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY a.id, a.name, a.initial_amount, a.asset_type, a.created_at ORDER BY a.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE assets SET name = #{name}, initial_amount = #{initialAmount}, asset_type = #{assetType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
